SEARCH
モジュール org.commonutils
パッケージ org.commonutils.id

クラス UuidV7IdGenerator

java.lang.Object
org.commonutils.id.UuidV7IdGenerator
すべての実装されたインタフェース:
IdGenerator<UUID>
public final class UuidV7IdGenerator extends Object implements IdGenerator<UUID>
IdGenerator for RFC 9562 UUID version 7. Constructors choose either a fixed Instant (each generate() reuses its truncated millisecond) or a Clock (each generate() uses Clock.instant() at call time). Batch generation is provided by UuidV7.

The no-argument forms that omit a RandomGenerator use the same cryptographically strong source as UuidV7.fromInstant(Instant). When a generator is supplied, thread safety matches that of the given generator; if it is not thread-safe, callers must synchronize externally or confine use to one thread.

Public constructors validate references with NullPointerException when null is not permitted.

導入されたバージョン:
0.2.0

  • コンストラクタの概要

    コンストラクタ
    コンストラクタ
    説明
    UuidV7IdGenerator(@NonNull Clock clock)
    Uses Clock.instant() on each generate() call with a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
    UuidV7IdGenerator(@NonNull Clock clock, @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator)
    Uses Clock.instant() on each generate() call with the supplied RandomGenerator.
    UuidV7IdGenerator(@NonNull Instant instant)
    Uses a fixed instant and a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator on each generate() call.
    UuidV7IdGenerator(@NonNull Instant instant, @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator)
    Uses a fixed instant and the supplied RandomGenerator on each generate() call.

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    @NonNull UUID
    generate()
    Generates a new UUID v7.

    クラスから継承されたメソッド java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • UuidV7IdGenerator

      public UuidV7IdGenerator(@NonNull @NonNull Instant instant)
      Uses a fixed instant and a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator on each generate() call.
      パラメータ:
      instant - instant whose millisecond value is embedded repeatedly, must not be null
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if instant is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the instant is not representable as a 48-bit unsigned Unix timestamp (see UuidV7)
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • UuidV7IdGenerator

      public UuidV7IdGenerator(@NonNull @NonNull Instant instant, @NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator)
      Uses a fixed instant and the supplied RandomGenerator on each generate() call.
      パラメータ:
      instant - instant whose millisecond value is embedded repeatedly, must not be null
      randomGenerator - source of random payload bits, must not be null
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the instant is not representable as a 48-bit unsigned Unix timestamp (see UuidV7)
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • UuidV7IdGenerator

      public UuidV7IdGenerator(@NonNull @NonNull Clock clock)
      Uses Clock.instant() on each generate() call with a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
      パラメータ:
      clock - clock to read, must not be null
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if clock is null
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • UuidV7IdGenerator

      public UuidV7IdGenerator(@NonNull @NonNull Clock clock, @NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator)
      Uses Clock.instant() on each generate() call with the supplied RandomGenerator.
      パラメータ:
      clock - clock to read, must not be null
      randomGenerator - source of random payload bits, must not be null
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

  • メソッドの詳細

    • generate

      @NonNull public @NonNull UUID generate()
      Generates a new UUID v7.
      定義:
      generate インタフェース内 IdGenerator<UUID>
      戻り値:
      a non-null UUID per RFC 9562 version 7 and this generator's configuration
      例外:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this generator uses a Clock and the current instant is not representable as a 48-bit unsigned Unix timestamp
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0
